description_long: This figure depicts an adult with a rounded, expressive face featuring prominent eyes and a curled mustache. The individual is dressed in a jacket with a high collar, straight-legged pants, and pointed shoes. One arm is bent at the elbow, while the other holds a large, mechanical object resembling a futuristic or industrial device. The surface of the figure is glossy, with visible brush strokes and sculpted details, giving it a hand-crafted appearance. The mechanical object is detailed with angular shapes and protrusions, suggesting it is a significant accessory. The overall form is stylized, with exaggerated proportions and a whimsical, almost caricature-like quality.
description: A stylized adult figure with a round face, mustache, and jacket, holding a large mechanical device. The figure has a glossy, hand-crafted appearance and exaggerated features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expressive face, curled mustache, and the large mechanical device held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the size and details of the mechanical device and the figure's bent arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, pants, and the mechanical device slung over the shoulder.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the hand, and the mechanical device's structure.
attribute_clothing_type: jacket with high collar and straight-legged pants
